headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -99.3)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 347% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 146 quotes and an overwhelming 125 at strong intensity, driving a high score of 81.1 as people are venting forcefully today.
• The frustration score sits in the upper half of its 169-day range (-1.1 to 169.2), reflecting well above average activity but not yet at peak levels.
• Fears recovered sharply from yesterday's -11.7 to -2.0, while Optimism also climbed from -40.1 to -20.1, though both remain in negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
